result.summary:
No verifiable corporate entity matches the name **Zxqwer Phoenix Holdings of Atlantis** in major registries (UK Companies House, US state databases, Australia ABR, India MCA) or business directories. Search results identify unrelated entities, including Phoenix Group Holdings PLC (UK company #11606773, active financial services holding, registered at 20 Old Bailey, London EC4M 7AN)[1][3], Phoenix International Holdings Inc. (US marine services firm, Maryland-based)[2][5][7][10], ZXPE Services Private Limited (India CIN U62090DL2025PTC440789, active IT services, Delhi-registered 2025)[4], and ZX Group Pty Ltd (Australia ABN 12062507519, active VIC-based)[6]; none align with the queried name, jurisdiction, or "Atlantis" reference, suggesting a potential misspelling, defunct entity, or fabrication.[1][2][3][4][6]

No regulatory or litigation history ties any similar-named entity to telemarketing violations, including zero FCC/FTC enforcement actions, state-AG complaints, TCPA suits, or elevated BBB complaints; results show no consumer protection issues for these firms, which operate in finance, marine services, IT, and unrelated sectors.[1][2][4][5][6][7][10]  
**Unknown** (no assets or status confirmed).
